programmes.show_name: The Shadow of the Cutteslowe Walls
programmes.show_description: 5/5. For 25 years, eight-foot-high walls separated the residents of an Oxford council estate from their middle-class neighbours. This is the story of Cutteslowe nearly 70 years on.
